requirements.acceptance: ls .github/workflows/ci.yml succeeds; the file parses as valid YAML with name, on, jobs keys

requirements.text: CI triggers on push to main and pull_request to main
requirements.acceptance: The on: key contains both push (with branches: [main]) and pull_request (with branches: [main])
A step uses uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2; the job runs on ubuntu-latest
A step runs run: bun test test/; the step name is descriptive (e.g., Run tests)

requirements.text: CI runs bun build index.ts --target bun --external @oh-my-pi/pi-ai --external @oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent
requirements.acceptance: A step runs the build command with both --external flags; the step name is descriptive (e.g., Verify build)

requirements.text: CI fails on non-zero exit from any step
requirements.acceptance: If bun test test/ or the build command exits non-zero, the CI job fails (GitHub Actions default behavior — no continue-on-error or || true to mask failures)

requirements.text: package.json build script runs bun build index.ts --target bun --external @oh-my-pi/pi-ai --external @oh-my-pi/pi-coding-agent
requirements.acceptance: bun run build executes the build command and exits 0 (verified locally before merge)

requirements.text: package.json check script runs bun test test/
requirements.acceptance: bun run check executes bun test test/ and exits 0 with 57 passing tests

requirements.text: package.json clean echo stub is removed
requirements.acceptance: grep -c '"clean"' package.json returns 0; the scripts object contains only build and check

requirements.text: CI workflow uses actions/checkout@v4 before Bun setup
requirements.acceptance: A step uses uses: actions/checkout@v4 before the oven-sh/setup-bun@v2 step
The job has a name: key (e.g., ci or verify) rather than relying on the default

requirements.text: CI workflow file is committed to the repo
requirements.acceptance: git status shows .github/workflows/ci.yml as a tracked file after commit

success_criteria: .github/workflows/ci.yml exists, is valid YAML, and triggers on push and pull_request to main
CI workflow runs bun test test/ (57 tests) and bun build index.ts --target bun --external with both OMP packages
package.json scripts are real commands: build runs bun build, check runs bun test, clean is removed
bun run check passes 57 tests with exit 0; bun run build exits 0
No continue-on-error or error masking in the CI workflow
